name: function-calling
context: Function/tool calling standard — define tools, handle tool calls, and return results
info: Function calling (also called tool use) allows OpenAI models to invoke structured tools during a conversation. You define tools as JSON Schema objects in the `tools` parameter of a chat completion request (see [[openai/chat]]). When the model determines a tool should be called, it returns a `tool_calls` array with the function name and JSON arguments instead of plain text. Your application executes the function, then sends the result back as a tool message. This enables structured data extraction, external API integration, multi-step workflows, and agent-like behavior. Models can request multiple tool calls in parallel. Function calling works with both direct [[openai/chat]] completions and [[openai/assistants]] runs.
triggers: build an agent with tool use

sections.title: Define tools
sections.body: Tools are JSON objects with `type: 'function'` and a `function` property containing `name`, `description`, and `parameters` (JSON Schema). Clear descriptions help the model decide when to call each tool. Parameter descriptions improve argument accuracy. Use `enum` to constrain string values. See [[openai/chat]] for passing tools to the Chat Completions API.

sections.title: Handle tool calls
sections.body: Check `finish_reason === 'tool_calls'` in the response. Parse `tool_calls[].function.arguments` (JSON string). Execute the function in your application. Add the assistant message (with tool_calls) and tool result messages (role: tool, tool_call_id, content) to the conversation. Send the updated messages back to the model for a final response.

sections.title: Parallel tool calls
sections.body: Models can request multiple tool calls in a single response. Process all calls, add all tool messages, then send the batch back. The model synthesizes all results into one coherent response. Disable with `parallel_tool_calls: false` if sequential execution is required.

sections.title: Structured output via tools
sections.body: Use function calling for structured data extraction by defining an extraction schema as a tool. Set `tool_choice: { type: 'function', function: { name: '...' } }` to force the model to call it. Parse the `arguments` JSON for structured output. This approach complements [[openai/chat#structured-output]] (`response_format`) — use tools when you need multiple extraction schemas or when combining with real function calls.
